response.summary: Strategic Product leader with extensive experience in roadmap planning and GTM execution across SaaS environments. Proven track record in process engineering and cross-functional alignment to drive operational excellence and product adoption. An AI-forward professional skilled in leveraging automation to optimize workflows and deliver high-impact results in complex, global settings.
